description: Focus on AI-powered README generation, smart suggestions, and automated content structuring.

tasks: [✅] Integrate AI API (OpenAI/Anthropic) for intelligent README suggestions
[✅] Implement auto-generation of missing sections (e.g., Installation, License)
[✅] Add context menu action to 'Rewrite section for clarity or tone'
[✅] Implement an automated Table of Contents (TOC) generator and updater

technical_goals: Securely integrate external AI APIs without leaking keys (e.g., Implement BYOK - Bring Your Own Key)
next_version_considerations: Refine the Live Quality Audit (from v1.3.0 backlog) and add export options
Expand AI capabilities with local models (e.g., Ollama support)
Add more interactive template options for specific project types (React, CLI, etc.)
